title: Simple & rapid genotyping of marine microeukaryotes
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fflni","text":"This is an effective protocol for genotyping diatom exconjugants which we believe is readily applicable to any other genetically manipulated marine microeukaryote.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"co7oh","text":"1. We find Phire Plant Direct PCR Master Mix  to be a top choice for direct genotyping of diatom exconjugants. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":11,"length":34}],"data":[]},{"key":"emu5d","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3nn79","text":"2. before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"2kf07","text":"1. Your exconjugant colonies should be growing as small - ~300 µL - liquid cultures in the presence of appropriate antibiotics. A 48-well plate works great for this purpose.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"j7ne","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dg7jf","text":"2. steps: --> volumes are per reaction --> x (number of strains + 2) undetermined, MQ undetermined, 10 µM forward primer undetermined, 10 µM reverse primer undetermined, Phire Plant Direct PCR Master Mix
--> Include appropriate positive (if available) and negative controls. --> Include WT or knockout strain you used for transformation as a template in one of the reactions.
--> 1:100 or 1:50 dilution into 10 mL fresh medium is a good place to start.
creator: Jernej Turnšek
